name: INNOVATIVE INDUSTRIAL PROPERTIES INC
summary: PART I General As used herein, the terms we, us, our or the Company refer to Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc., a Maryland corporation, and any of our subsidiaries, including IIP Operating Partnership, LP, a Delaware limited partnership (our Operating Partnership). We are an internally-managed REIT focused on the acquisition, ownership and management of specialized industrial and commercial properties in the United States.
